title: What is the single most important thing here?
guidance: Reward insight and restraint over coverage — the one thing that should change the decision.

runner_input.instruction: Identify the single most important insight from the data below.
runner_input.constraints: One slide title + 1–2 sentence insight. No bullet lists.

source_blocks.text: A portfolio company missed its Q3 revenue target by 6%. The CRO has proposed increasing marketing spend 30%.

items: Two senior AEs resigned this quarter

rubric_notes: The key insight is that MQLs are up but SQLs flat — a mid-funnel problem, not a top-funnel one.
